ns0:entry.ns0:title: DaveGamble/cJSON
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DaveGamble/cJSON
Language: c
Ultralightweight JSON parser in ANSI C

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenMathLib/OpenBLAS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenMathLib/OpenBLAS
Language: c
OpenBLAS is an optimized BLAS library based on GotoBLAS2 1.13 BSD version.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ahrm/sioyek
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ahrm/sioyek
Language: c
Sioyek is a PDF viewer with a focus on textbooks and research papers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: axboe/liburing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/axboe/liburing
Language: c
Library providing helpers for the Linux kernel io_uring support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foobnix/LibreraReader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foobnix/LibreraReader
Language: c
Book Reader for Android

ns0:entry.ns0:title: littlefs-project/littlefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/littlefs-project/littlefs
Language: c
A little fail-safe filesystem designed for microcontrollers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pgvector/pgvector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector
Language: c
Open-source vector similarity search for Postgres

ns0:entry.ns0:title: portapack-mayhem/mayhem-firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/portapack-mayhem/mayhem-firmware
Language: c
Custom firmware for the HackRF+PortaPack H1/H2/H4

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raspberrypi/linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raspberrypi/linux
Language: c
Kernel source tree for Raspberry Pi-provided kernel builds. Issues unrelated to the linux kernel should be posted on the community forum at https://forums.raspberrypi.com/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redcanaryco/atomic-red-team
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team
Language: c
Small and highly portable detection tests based on MITRE's ATT&CK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
Language: c
Scripts which perform an installable binary image build for SONiC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tmux/tmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tmux/tmux
Language: c
tmux source code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
